evals.expected_output: Formatted conversation view with OpenAI-style message dicts, merged stream chunks, startup summary, routing info

assertions.name: runs_parser_script
assertions.description: Invokes parse_debug_log.py (not just reads the raw log file)

assertions.name: shows_openai_format
assertions.description: Output contains OpenAI-style message dicts with role/content keys

assertions.name: stream_chunks_merged
assertions.description: Individual stream token chunks are merged into complete messages, not shown individually

evals.prompt: what errors happened in the gemini log?
evals.expected_output: Filtered view showing only warnings and errors from the debug log

assertions.name: uses_level_filter
assertions.description: Uses --level warn or --level error flag to filter output

assertions.name: highlights_issues
assertions.description: Clearly presents warnings/errors, not buried in noise

evals.expected_output: JSON array output with structured session/event data

assertions.name: uses_json_flag
assertions.description: Uses --json flag when running the parser

assertions.name: valid_json_output
assertions.description: Output is valid JSON with session/event structure
